entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: Ja. Skole kan eers die openbare produk gebruik en dan pasgemaakte AI-leerruimtes met skoolspesifieke werkvloeie, vertroulikheid en befondsde toegangsopsies bespreek.

entries.source: Yes. Subject hubs are public pages built for learners, Google, and AI answer engines. They expose only public learning guidance and public guest-mode URLs, not private saved chats.
entries.value: Ja. Onderwerphubs is openbare bladsye wat is gebou vir leerders, Google en AI-antwoordmasjiene. Hulle tonen net openbare leerbegeleiding en openbare gasmodus-URL's, geen privaat gestoor chats.

entries.source: Yes. Teachers and school leaders can use the public prompt library to evaluate learning behaviors before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Ja. Docenten en skoolleiders kan die openbare promptbiblioteek gebruik om leergedrag te besluitoordeel voordat hulle 'n skoolimplementatie op maat bepraat.

entries.source: Yes. The guide library links into public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, and historical conversations.
entries.value: Ja. Die gidsbiblioteek linkt na openbare gasmodusse soos Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, vasvrae, flitskaarte en historiese gesprekken.

entries.source: Yes. The historical person mode is a learning simulation for perspective and questioning. It should not be cited as an authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Ja. Die historiese-persoonmodus is 'n leersimulatie vir perspectief en vrae vra. Die moet nie word geciteerd as 'n geauthulleticeerd citaat.

entries.source: Yes. The linked public learning modes open in guest mode, so learners can try explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, and more without starting from a marketing page.
entries.value: Ja. Die gekoppele openbare leermodusse oopmaak in gasmodus, zodat leerders verduideliking, Sokratiese vrae, huiswerkafrigtering, vasvrae, flitskaarte en meer kan probeer sonder vanaf 'n marketingbladsy te begin.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: Ja. Die openbare gaansleermodusse is ontwerp vir gratis toegang, sodat leerders kan begin sonder om 'n skoolontplooiing of betaale rekening nodig te hê.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Ja. Die openbare gasmodusse en teikengroepbladsye is zo ontwerp dat ouers wat leergedrag kan inspecteren voordat hulle erop vertroue.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Ja. Die openbare gasmodusse laat skoolleiders en onderwysers die leerervaring probeer voordat hulle 'n skoolimplementatie op maat bepraat.

entries.source: Yes. The public Homework Coach is available at /chat/homework-coach, and this subject hub links to the supporting modes and guides.
entries.value: Ja. Die openbare Homework Coach is beskikbaar op /chat/homework-coach, en hierdie onderwerphub linkt na die ondersteunende modusse en gidse.

entries.source: Yes. The recommended use is hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, and review prompts rather than final answers you cannot explain.
entries.value: Ja. Die aanbevolen gebruik is wenke, verduideliking, stapkontroles, terugvoer en herhaalprompts in plaas van eindantwoorde wat jy nie kan verduidelik.

entries.source: Yes. Use Time Travel for context, History Cause and Effect for argument structure, Debate for counterarguments, and Source Critic for evidence boundaries.
entries.value: Ja. Gebruik Time Travel vir konteks, History Cause and Effect vir argumentstruktuur, Debate vir teenargumente en Source Critic vir bewysgrense.

entries.source: You are solely responsible for your conduct and any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links ("Content") that you submit, post, and display on the inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected data for various purposes: To provide and maintain our Service To notify you about changes to our Service To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so to provide customer support To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service To monitor the usage of our Service to detect, prevent and address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose for which you provide it To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any contracts entered into between you and us, including for billing and collection To provide you with notices about your account and/or subscription, including expiration and renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless you have opted not to receive such information In any other way we may describe when you provide the information For any other purpose with your consent
entries.value: Jy is as enige verantwoordelik vir jou gedrag en alle data, teks, inligting, skermname, grafika, foto's, profiele, klank- en videoclips, skakels ("Inhoud") wat jy op die inspir-platform indien, plaas en vertoon. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) gebruik die versamele data vir verskillende doeleindes: om ons Diens te lewer en te onderhou; om jy op die hoogte te vra van veranderings in ons Diens; om jy te laat deelneem aan interaktiewe funksies van ons Diens wanneer jy daarvoor kies; om kliëntediens te bieden; om ontleding of waardevolle inligting te versamel zodat ons ons Diens kan verbeter; om die gebruik van ons Diens te monitor; om tegniese probleme op te spoor, te voorkom en aan te pakken; om elke ander doel te vervul waarvoor jy die inligting verskaf; om ons verpligingen uit te voeren en ons regte af te dwingen wat voortvloeien uit kontrakte tussen jou en ons, insluitend fakturering en invordering; om jy kennisgewings oor jy rekening en/of intekening te sturen, insluitend verstryking- en verlengingskennisgewings, e-posinstruksies, enz.; om jy nuus, spesiale aanbiedings en algemene inligting te gee oor ander goedere, dienste en geleenthede wat ons aanbied en wat vergelykbaar is met wat jy al wat gekoop of waarna jy wat navraag gedoen, tensy jy ervoor wat gekies sodanige inligting nie te ontvang; op elke ander manier wat ons beskryf wanneer jy die inligting verskaf; vir elke ander doel met jou toestemming.

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Jy kan ook begin met 'n ruwe versie van jou regte probleem. 'n rommelige eerste prompt is prima. Die sessie kan wat vlak, die teikengroep, sperdatum en styl verduideliken zodra jy begint.

entries.source: You can contact our Copyright Agent via email at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Jy kan kontak opneem met ons Copyright Agent via e-mail op support@inspir.app

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: Jy kan wat format probeer in Talk to a Historical Person. As jy eers die breere scene wil voordat jy 'n persoon ontmoet, gebruik dan Time Travel om 'n periode te besluitsoek, beperkings te inspecteren en daarna te vrae watter keuses mense werklik hadden.

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: Jy weet dat 'n Sokratiese AI-tutor wat gewerkt wanneer die leerder drie dingen kan doen:

entries.source: You may provide us either directly at support@inspir.app or via third party sites and tools with information and feedback concerning errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, and other matters related to our Service (“Feedback”). You acknowledge and agree that: (i) you shall not retain, acquire or assert any intellectual property right or other right, title or interest in or to the Feedback; (ii) Company may have development ideas similar to the Feedback; (iii) Feedback does not contain confidential information or proprietary information from you or any third party; and (iv) Company is not under any obligation of confidentiality with respect to the Feedback. In the event the transfer of the ownership to the Feedback is not possible due to applicable mandatory laws, you grant Company and its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited and perpetual right to use (including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute and commercialize) Feedback in any manner and for any purpose.
entries.value: Jy kan ons regstreeks via support@inspir.app of via sites en hulpmiddels van derde partye inligting en terugvoer gee oor foute, suggesties vir verbeteringen, ideeen, probleme, klachten en ander zaken wat verband hou met ons Diens ("Feedback"). Jy erkent en stemt ermee in dat: (i) jy geen intellectueel eiendomsreg of ander reg, titel of belang in of op die Feedback behou, verkrijgt of opeist; (ii) Company ontwikkelingsideeen kan wat wat vergelykbaar is met die Feedback; (iii) Feedback geen vertroulike inligting of eiendomsinligting van jou of 'n derde bevat; en (iv) Company geen geheimhoudingsplicht wat met betrekking tot die Feedback. As oordrag van eiendom van die Feedback vanwege toepaslike dwingende wetgeving nie moontlik is, verleen jy Company en haar gelieerde ondernemingen 'n exclusief, overdraagbaar, onherroepelijk, kosteloos, sublisensieerbaar, onbeperk en eeuwigdurend reg om Feedback op elke manier en vir elke doel te gebruik (insluitend kopieer, wysig, afgeleide werk maak, publiceren, versprei en commercialiseren).

entries.source: You may submit a notification pursuant to the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) by providing our Copyright Agent with the following information in writing (see 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) for further detail):
entries.value: Jy kan 'n kennisgeving indienen op grond van die Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) deur ons Copyright Agent die volgende inligting schriftelijk te verskaf (zie 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) vir meer details):

entries.source: You may use Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with Terms. You agree not to use Service:
entries.value: Jy mag Diens net gebruik vir wettige doeleindes en in overeenstemming met Terms. Jy stemt ermee in Diens nie te gebruik:

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights Under General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
entries.value: Jy databeschermingsregte onder die General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)
entries.value: Jy databeschermingsregte onder die California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights under the California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA)
entries.value: Jy databeschermingsregte onder die California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA)

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: Jy inligting, insluitend Personal Data, kan word overgedragen na en bewaard op rekenas wat homself buite jy staat, provincie, land of ander overheidsjurisdictie bevind, waar die databeschermingswette kan verschillen van wat in jou jurisdictie. As jy jy buite India bevindt en ervoor kies ons inligting te verskaf, hou er dan rekening mee dat ons die data, insluitend Personal Data, na India overdragen en daar verwerk. Jy toestemming met hierdie Privacy Policy, gevolgd deur jy indiening van sodanige inligting, beteken dat jy met wat oordrag instemt. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) neemt alle redelijkerwijs nodige stappe om ervoor te zorgen dat jy data veilig en in overeenstemming met hierdie Privacy Policy word behandeld, en er vindt geen oordrag van jou Personal Data na 'n orgaannisatie of land plek tensy er voldoende kontroles bestaan, insluitend die beveiliging van jou data en ander persoonlike data.
